facts.text: /*GENERAL*/ body { font-family: "Jersey 25", sans-serif; margin: 0; padding: 0; display: flex; justify-content: center; } p,h1, h2, h3, ol, a { margin: 0; padding: 0; color:#CABA9C; } #title { width: 100%; background-color: #1F0900; color: #CABA9C; text-align: center; padding-top: 5px; padding-bottom: 5px; font-size: 50px; font-family:"Rye"; } button:hover { opacity: .75; cursor:pointer; } a { text-decoration: none; } a:hover { opacity: .75; } button { display: flex; gap: 10px; background-color: #960b0b; color:#CABA9C; padding: 5px; font-family: "Jersey 25", sans-serif; font-size: 20px; } hr { color:#CABA9C; width: 100%; } ul { padding: 0; padding-left: 15px; color:#CABA9C; } /* CONTAINER */ .container { display: flex; flex-direction: column; margin-top: 50px; margin-bottom: 50px; margin-left: 15%; margin-right: 15%; gap: 5px; justify-content: center; background-color: #1f0900; background-image: url("https://www.transparenttextures.com/patterns/wood-pattern.png"); padding: 20px; border: 10px solid #1F0900; } .headings { display: flex; flex-direction: row; padding: 5px; background-color:#1F0900; gap: 5px; width: 50vw; } .headings h2 { color:#CABA9C; } .mainContent { display: flex; gap: 25px; justify-content: center; flex-wrap: nowrap; } .footer { padding-top: 10px; padding-bottom: 10px; background: #1F0900; color: #CABA9C; display:flex; gap: 5px; width:100%; } /*LEFT COLUMN*/ .leftColumn { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; padding: 10px; gap: 25px; background-color: #222519; border: 7px ridge #CABA9C; flex-grow: 1; max-width: 250px; } ol { list-style: none; } ol li::before { content: ""; display: inline-block; width: 20px; height: 20px; background-image: url("https://bettysgraphics.neocities.org/images/plants/mushroom%2020.gif"); background-size: contain; background-repeat: no-repeat; } .navList { color: #CABA9C; cursor: pointer; } .dropdown-container { display: none; padding-left: 20px; } .dropdown:hover .dropdown-container { display: block; } #navImage { align-self:center; width:200px; border-width:10px; border-style:solid; border-image: url("https://i.ibb.co/LYSfp26/C9487459-587-E-4-EDC-89-C1-2-B2-F0804-F5-A7.png") 35 fill round; } /*CENTER COLUMN*/ .middleColumn { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 25px; flex-grow:2; background-color: #222519; border: 7px ridge #CABA9C; padding: 25px; } .statusUpdates { padding: 5px; height: 200px; width: 100%; background-color: #1F0900; color: #CABA9C; overflow: scroll; } /*RIGHT COLUMN*/ .rightColumn { display: flex; flex-direction: column; align-items: center; gap: 25px; flex-grow:1; padding: 10px; background-color: #222519; border: 7px ridge #CABA9C; } #pfp { max-width: 200px; max-height: 200px; border: .75em solid; border-image-slice: 130 125 125 130; border-image-outset:0px 0px 0px 0px; border-image-repeat:stretch stretch; border-image-source:url("https://files.catbox.moe/16vx4u.png"); }
